## What this changes

A short description of the change and the motivation behind it.

Closes #<!-- issue number, if applicable -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title is a valid [Conventional Commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org) (we squash-merge).
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change.
- [ ] `go test ./... -race` passes locally.
- [ ] `gofmt`, `go vet` and `golangci-lint run ./...` are clean.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes).
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, doc comments) where relevant.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas of risk.
